name: agent-kevin
description: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, Playwright, Perplexity), and ships 18 skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.
